name: design
description: | Use when the user wants the visual/experiential design of a product done systematically — a design system, a screen, a landing page, or a visual identity — grounded in researched real-world prior art and free of AI slop. Establishes/extends the design system, invokes the matching local taste skill, dispatches the designer specialist, and reviews for taste + accessibility. Standalone — ends with a handoff gate into the chain. Trigger with /hyperflow:design, "design the UI", "make a design syste
author: jeremylongshore
